projects.name: Solar + Energy Storage on Garage
projects.description: Install 5-7 solar panels on south-facing garage roof face (20x12 ft, ~2-2.8 kW) plus battery storage. Solar = standalone ROI investment (~5yr payback at $0.42/kWh). Battery = generator alternative (no lot space for generator). 30% federal ITC applies to both when paired.
projects.notes: DESIGN: South garage face only. 5 portrait panels = 2.0 kW; 7 mixed = 2.8 kW. ~3,200-4,500 kWh/yr production (20-26% offset). All-in after ITC: solar ~$9-10k, battery ~$9-10k. VENDORS: Sunergy (sunergy.com) — EnergySage 2026 CA Installer of Year, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door. NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com) — Diamond Certified, 35yr, San Mateo County, 40yr warranty. Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy) — online only. AVOID: Sunrun.

tasks.title: Analyze energy usage and size system
tasks.notes: 17,178 kWh/yr at $0.42/kWh avg. Target: 5-7 panels south garage face (20x12 ft) = 2-2.8 kW. ~5yr payback after ITC.

tasks.title: Research and shortlist solar installers
tasks.notes: Shortlist: Sunergy (sunergy.com, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door), NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com, Diamond Certified, San Mateo County), Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy, online only). Avoid Sunrun.

tasks.title: Contact installers for quotes
tasks.notes: Spec: south garage face (20x12 ft, 5-7 panels, ~2-2.8 kW), paired battery (Enphase IQ or Powerwall 3), detached garage sub-panel interconnect. Ask each for: $/W, panel brand, inverter type, battery spec, warranty, timeline, ITC total. Request free shade/LIDAR analysis.

tasks.title: Compare quotes and select installer
tasks.notes: Prefer Enphase microinverters over string inverter. Compare $/W, battery spec, warranty, timeline. 30% ITC on full system incl. battery.

tasks.title: Confirm ITC timing — credit files in year PTO is granted
tasks.notes: 30% federal ITC on Form 5695. Claimed in tax year Permission to Operate granted by PG&E. Battery qualifies only when solar-paired. Plan install timing accordingly.

needs_attention.title: Contact installers for quotes

observations.summary: Steve walks through the living room while Miller and Penelope relax on the couch. A dog is active and moving near Miller as the family spends time in the common area.
No water flow. Daily usage: 328.2 gal.
The front yard camera is currently failing to provide a video feed, displaying an error message instead. No visual information is available to monitor the driveway, street, or yard.
Miller is sitting on the couch in the living room, seemingly watching TV. An impact or movement sound has been detected in the backyard.
The dog run is empty, with a single tennis ball resting on the artificial grass. No dogs or people are visible in the scene.
Penelope and Miller are sitting on the couch in the living room, seemingly watching TV. A dog is also present on the couch, likely reacting to the impact sounds being detected in the backyard.
The side passage and backyard are empty. No people or dogs are visible in the area.

insights.summary: [living_room] Impact/movement sound detected in the backyard

Despite the family being present (16:01 presence signal) and the visual scenes appearing calm, there is a persistent and escalating pattern of alarm/siren and impact sounds detected in the backyard and living room (15:13, 15:16, 15:37, 15:43, 16:02, 16:03). This recurring audio anomaly, coupled with the non-functional front door camera, suggests a potential technical malfunction, a persistent external disturbance, or an unseen security issue that requires immediate investigation.
[living_room] Impact sounds detected in the backyard may indicate an issue or intruder, despite the calm appearance in the living room.
Unusually high activity at backyard this hour: 4 observations vs typical 1 for weekday 16:00
High-activity pattern: living_room averaging 48 camera observations/day over the last 7 days.
[doorbell] The front door camera is down, and an alarm/siren is sounding in the backyard.
[living_room] Alarm and impact sounds detected in the backyard, which may indicate a security issue or accident.
[living_room] Alarm and impact sounds detected in the backyard.
[front_yard] An unknown dark car is parked in the driveway.
[living_room] Alarm and impact sounds detected in the backyard, suggesting a potential security issue or accident outside.
